heading: False statements to purchasers or lessees relating to tax
label: 7211 False statements to purchasers or lessees relating to tax

children.text: intended or calculated to lead any person to believe that any part of the price at which such article is sold or leased, or offered for sale or lease, consists of a tax imposed under the authority of the United States, or
ascribing a particular part of such price to a tax imposed under the authority of the United States,
